tldr_zh: OpenAI推AI計分卡衡量投資回報；Databricks估值達188億美元；台灣製造業遭中國Daxin惡意軟體攻擊13年
tldr_en: OpenAI introduces AI scorecard for ROI measurement; Databricks reaches $188B valuation; Taiwan manufacturers targeted by Chinese Daxin malware for 13 years

items.title_zh: OpenAI推出AI計分卡衡量實際業務價值
items.title_en: OpenAI Introduces AI Scorecard to Measure Business ROI
items.summary_zh: OpenAI首席財務官Sarah Friar發布實用型AI計分卡，透過有用工作量、每項成功任務成本、可靠性和計算投資回報率等指標來衡量AI應用的真實商業價值。這個工具幫助企業評估AI投資是否真正帶來商業效益。
items.summary_en: OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar introduces a practical AI scorecard measuring ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute. The tool helps enterprises assess whether AI investments deliver genuine business value.

items.title_zh: Databricks融資後估值達188億美元，成AI產業新寵
items.title_en: Databricks Reaches $188B Valuation as AI Investment Favorite
items.summary_zh: 數據與AI基礎設施公司Databricks在最新融資中估值達到188億美元，進一步鞏固其在AI領域的領先地位。公司近期發布研究報告展示開放權重AI模型在代碼編寫上的成本優勢，成為AI產業的投資寵兒。
items.summary_en: Databricks reaches $188B valuation in latest funding, solidifying its position as an AI industry favorite. The company published research demonstrating cost savings of open weight AI models for coding tasks.

items.title_zh: DeepMind Isomorphic Labs公布超越AlphaFold的藥物設計引擎
items.title_en: Isomorphic Labs Unveils Drug Design Engine Beyond AlphaFold
items.summary_zh: Google旗下Isomorphic Labs發布新型藥物設計引擎，超越了知名的蛋白質結構預測工具AlphaFold，進入分子設計的新領域。這項突破展現AI在生物醫學領域的深化應用，有望加速新藥開發流程。
items.summary_en: DeepMind's Isomorphic Labs announces a drug design engine that goes beyond AlphaFold's capabilities, entering new frontiers in molecular design. The breakthrough demonstrates AI's expanding role in biomedical research.

items.title_zh: 天氣數據安全警示：關鍵基礎設施面臨新型網攻威脅
items.title_en: Weather Data Sabotage Risk Rising for Critical Infrastructure
items.summary_zh: MIT科技評論警示天氣預報數據遭破壞的風險日益上升。全球航空公司、電力公司和農民每天都依賴同一份天氣預報做決策，若被篡改將威脅生命安全和經濟效益。這成為網路安全的新前沿。
items.summary_en: MIT Tech Review reports rising risk of weather data sabotage threatening critical infrastructure. Airlines, grid operators, and farmers worldwide depend on the same weather forecasts daily; tampering could endanger lives and economies.

items.title_zh: 蘋果、谷歌遭舊金山命令刪除AI換臉應用程式
items.title_en: Apple, Google Ordered to Remove 'Nudify' AI Apps from Stores
items.summary_zh: 舊金山市檢察長發函要求蘋果和谷歌下架違法的AI換臉軟體，兩公司長期知悉這些違反州法的應用程式存在。官方估計兩家公司從換臉應用獲利數百萬美元，引發對AI濫用和責任歸屬的討論。
items.summary_en: San Francisco City Attorney orders Apple and Google to remove nudify apps violating state law. Both companies were aware of illegal applications for years; officials estimate they earned millions in fees from these apps.

items.title_zh: 蘋果Music漲價，個人月費調升至11.99美元
items.title_en: Apple Music Raises Prices Across All Subscription Tiers
items.summary_zh: 蘋果宣布調整Apple Music訂閱費用，美國個人月費從10.99美元漲至11.99美元，家庭方案從16.99美元漲至19.99美元，學生方案從5.99美元漲至6.99美元。這是蘋果服務價格持續調整的延續。
items.summary_en: Apple raises Apple Music prices in the US: individual plans to $11.99/month (+$1), family to $19.99/month (+$3), and student to $6.99/month (+$1), continuing the company's service price increases.

items.title_zh: TikTok測試AI換臉檢測工具，保護創作者權益
items.title_en: TikTok Tests AI Likeness Detection Tool for Creators
items.summary_zh: TikTok開始測試一款可掃描AI換臉內容的工具，讓創作者舉報非法使用其形象的AI生成內容。該工具目前在部分美國創作者中測試，YouTube也在開發類似功能，反映業界對AI濫用的重視。
items.summary_en: TikTok launches optional AI likeness detection tool allowing creators to report AI-generated deepfakes using their likenesses. Currently testing with select US creators; YouTube developing similar functionality.

items.title_zh: 谷歌支持的衛星系統成功發射，助力野火偵測
items.title_en: Google-Backed FireSat Satellites Launch for Wildfire Detection
items.summary_zh: 由谷歌資助的FireSat衛星計畫正式發射，可偵測其他衛星無法發現的火災。在美國加拿大野火煙霾肆虐之際發射，為野火防控帶來新的監測能力，展示太空技術對氣候災害應對的價值。
items.summary_en: Google-backed FireSat satellite program launches successfully, capable of detecting wildfires other satellites miss. Timely deployment as smoke from US-Canada wildfires chokes both nations.

items.title_zh: 台灣製造業遭中國Daxin後門軟體長期滲透逾13年
items.title_en: Taiwan Manufacturers Hit by Chinese Daxin Malware for 13+ Years
items.summary_zh: 台灣製造業公司遭中國惡意軟體Daxin長期埋伏長達13年，這個後門程式在受害企業內潛伏多年未被發現。這起供應鏈攻擊事件凸顯台灣關鍵產業面臨的嚴重網路安全威脅。
items.summary_en: Taiwan manufacturing companies discovered to have been compromised by Chinese Daxin backdoor malware for over 13 years. The persistent threat highlights critical cybersecurity vulnerabilities in Taiwan's strategic industries.

items.title_zh: NPM套件Jscrambler遭入侵，駭客散布Rust竊資軟體
items.title_en: Jscrambler NPM Package Compromised, Used to Distribute Rust Malware
items.summary_zh: JavaScript代碼保護工具Jscrambler的NPM套件在7月11日遭駭客入侵，被用於散布Rust竊資軟體。儘管NPM12大版本加強了供應鏈安全防護，但新的攻擊活動表明開發人員需要及時升級以對抗威脅。
items.summary_en: Jscrambler's NPM package compromised on July 11, used to distribute Rust information-stealing malware. Despite NPM's new security measures, the attack demonstrates ongoing supply chain vulnerabilities.

items.title_zh: 英特爾前CEO警告：台灣斷電衝擊超過大蕭條
items.title_en: Intel's Former CEO Warns Taiwan Outage Would Exceed Great Depression Impact
items.summary_zh: 英特爾前執行長季辛格指出，若中國完全切斷台灣能源供應導致晶片生產中斷，對全球經濟的衝擊將「比經濟大蕭條還要嚴重」。這凸顯台灣在全球半導體產業的關鍵地位和地緣政治風險。
items.summary_en: Former Intel CEO Paul Otellini warns that complete Chinese blockade of Taiwan's electricity supply would cause economic damage exceeding the Great Depression. Highlights Taiwan's critical role in global semiconductor supply.

items.title_zh: 墨西哥規模7.4強震撼動中美洲，海嘯警報發布
items.title_en: Magnitude 7.4 Earthquake Strikes Off Mexico Coast, Tsunami Alert
items.summary_zh: 墨西哥南部馬德羅港地區發生規模7.4強震，震源深度10公里。美國太平洋沿岸隨即發布海嘯警報，中美洲多地受到震波影響。災害評估工作正在進行中。
items.summary_en: Magnitude 7.4 earthquake strikes off Puerto Madero, Mexico with 10km depth. Tsunami warnings issued across Pacific coast; tremors felt throughout Central America.
